hooks.command: file=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then cargo fmt -- "$file" 2>/dev/null; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1 | head -20; fi
if [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test --all 2>&1 | tail -5 && cargo build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

cmd=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|cargo publish|git push.*--force'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked destructive command"}}' >&2; exit 2; fi
if [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo check --message-format short 2>&1 | tail -3; fi; echo 'DUUMBI session started'
